'''Breeka''' was a dry [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]. One of this world's native animals was a distant cousin to the [[Dewback/Legends|dewbacks]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 14|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 14]] {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
